query:
INSERT INTO music_playlists (user_id, name, description, is_public, track_count, total_duration) VALUES
(1, 'Morning Gospel Rotation', 'Uplifting gospel tracks for the morning broadcast', 1, 5, 1500),
(1, 'Legacy Restored Collection', 'Music from the Carlos Battle legacy - soul and R&B classics', 1, 4, 1200),
(1, 'Healing Frequencies', '432Hz and 528Hz healing frequency sessions', 1, 3, 4500),
(1, 'Evening Jazz & Blues', 'Smooth jazz and blues for evening wind-down', 1, 3, 1100),
(1, 'RRB Radio Top Hits', 'The most played tracks on RRB Radio', 1, 6, 1800),
(1, 'Sunday Service Worship', 'Gospel worship music for Sunday service broadcasts', 1, 4, 1200),
(1, 'Little Richard Tribute', 'Celebrating the Little Richard connection with rock & roll classics', 1, 3, 650),
(1, 'Night Meditation', 'Calming meditation and ambient tracks for nighttime relaxation', 1, 3, 6300);
